name: Iron Snout
description: Iron Snout is a fast, colorful and brutal fighting game in which you will be helping a piglet fight for its life against hordes of wolves.
requirements:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows XP, Vista, 7 or 8
  • Memory: 512 MB RAM
  • Graphics: 128MB
  • Storage: 20 MB available space
comment1:
Simple fun game, good to kill time, I guess if you wanted to it would be a pretty easy game to play while jerking it with one hand, simple up, left, right down button movement some enemies you bash others you avoid and then attack. It's got achievements and two levels to choose from and 2 modes. It might not seem much but one mode is fairly easy and then the second mode where 1 hit means your dead sure isn't as easy at first. Best of all its 11mb and its free and not graphical heavy for those who are still running lighter stuff.

Things I hope/might be coming anyways - Steam Cards and more levels

For now I recommend this game, but hopefully adds more features (which I'm fairly sure the dev will).
comment2: I think there should be a game mode where you fight a other pig
comment3: It took me right at 5 hours to get all the achievements in this game and I just wanna say that this is a great game and best of all it's FREE!  If you want to pass some time punching wolves while being a pig that knows kung-fu then this is a great game for you to pick up.  I have a friend that managed to kill 400 wolves in the city and I can't even come close to that.  Great game; pick it up, trust me.
